item.title: Surveillance Valley: The Secret Military History of the Internet
item.author: contact@klamathtech.diy (ҜŁΔΜΔŦĦ Ŧ€ĆĦ ĆØŁŁ€ĆŦƗV€)
item.description: Levine’s investigation into the ARPANET’s origins and the unbroken line between the internet’s military-surveillance roots and today’s tech industry. Essential background for anyone serious about understanding what the network actually is.
